name: init
description: Creates a singleton SDK instance. Must be called exactly once per process before any other API. Infrastructure config only; per-transaction identifiers go on the TransactionRequest.

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: SDK infrastructure configuration (transports, logging, cloud mode).

errors.when: init() called more than once in the same process.

responses.code:
# sdk: PinelabsSdk
print(sdk)  # <PinelabsSdk instance>
# sdk.is_initialized == True
# sdk.transports_available == ['TCP']
